steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents Apps" option in the "New Project" popup within Visual Studio Code to select app creation for Microsoft 365.
Click the "Other Teams Capabilities" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" popup within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Message Extension" option in the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog of Visual Studio Code - Insiders, located just below the input for the project root folder path.
